name: FeiyuTech Scorp Mini Gimbal Stabilizer
description: Capture smooth, dynamic video with your smartphone, mirrorless, pocket, or action camera using the SCORP-Mini 3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer from Feiyu.

features.Key Features:: Motorized 3-Axis Gimbal | For Smartphone, Mirrorless/Action Camera | 1.3" OLED Touchscreen, Button Control | Lightweight Design with 2.65 lb Payload | Arca-Type Quick Release Camera Plate | Smooth, Electronically Dampened Knob | 2500mAh Battery with 13-Hour Runtime | 5 x Follow Modes for Customized Control | Dedicated Portrait Mode Button | Feiyu SCORP & ON Android/iOS Apps
features.What's in the box?: Feiyu SCORP Mini | USB-A 2.0 to USB-C Data Cable | USB-C to Micro-USB Cable (A03) | USB-C to USB-C Cable (C02) | USB-C to TRS 2.5mm Cable (T02) | USB-C to Sony Multi Shutter Cable | USB-C to 2.5mm DC Panasonic Shutter Cable | Tripod | Fixed Plate Slider | Quick Release Plate | Lens Holder | Lens Holder Screw | Camera Mounting Screw | Smartphone Holder | Long Thumbscrew | GoPro Adapter | Focus Motor Support Rod | Support Rod Mounting Screw | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
